title: Birth to 12 Months Developmental Checklist
description: Track the first year with confidence. Covers 4 domains across 4 age bands — with Emerging and Consistent tracking, red flag indicators, and a Google Sheets progress tracker. For parents, teachers, therapists, and early intervention providers.
